---
title: "Examples"
subtitle: "Task-oriented templates organized by analysis type"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

This page indexes the example templates. Each link below points to a single runnable page that shows a complete workflow: data setup → fit → diagnostics → prediction/interpretation.

Use examples as **templates**: copy the minimal pattern (bundle/fit + S3 methods) and then swap kernels/backends/tail settings as your problem demands.

::: {.callout-note}
If you are new, start with the Start hub and then return here. The full API documentation lives in pkgdown.
:::

## Unconditional (bulk-only)

- [ex01 — Unconditional DPM (CRP)](ex01-unconditional-dpm-crp.html)
- [ex02 — Unconditional DPM (SB)](ex02-unconditional-dpm-sb.html)

## Unconditional (bulk + GPD tail)

- [ex03 — Unconditional DPM+GPD (CRP)](ex03-unconditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
- [ex04 — Unconditional DPM+GPD (SB)](ex04-unconditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)

## Conditional (bulk-only)

- [ex05 — Conditional DPM (CRP)](ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html)
- [ex06 — Conditional DPM (SB)](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb.html)

## Conditional (bulk + GPD tail)

- [ex07 — Conditional DPM+GPD (CRP)](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
- [ex08 — Conditional DPM+GPD (SB)](ex08-conditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)

## Causal

- [ex09 — Causal, no X (CRP)](ex09-causal-no-x-crp.html)
- [ex10 — Causal, X no PS (SB)](ex10-causal-x-no-ps-sb.html)
- [ex11 — Causal, same backend (CRP)](ex11-causal-same-backend-crp.html)
- [ex12 — Causal, same backend (SB)](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb.html)
- [ex13 — Causal, different backends (CRP)](ex13-causal-different-backends-crp.html)
- [ex14 — Causal, different backends (SB)](ex14-causal-different-backends-sb.html)

## Clustering

- [ex15 — Clustering with GPD tail, weights + covariates](ex15-clustering-dpmgpd-weights.html)
- [ex16 — Clustering with regular kernel, parameter links + covariates](ex16-clustering-dpm-param.html)

## Other resources

- Start hub: [Start](../start/index.html)
- Website roadmap: [Roadmaps](../roadmap.qmd)
- Advanced hub: [Advanced](../advanced/index.html)
- Kernels hub: [Kernels](../kernels/kernels-index.html)
- API reference (pkgdown): [Reference](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Model Umbrella](../advanced/model-umbrella.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
